steps.title: Find the rate per lesson
steps.content:
Use the charge for $8$ lessons and the charge for $18$ lessons. The change in charge divided by the change in lessons is
$$\frac{590-240}{18-8}=\frac{350}{10}=35$$
So each additional lesson adds $35$ dollars.

steps.title: Find the linear rule
steps.content:
Use $f(x)=35x+b$ and substitute the charge for $8$ lessons:
$$240=35(8)+b$$
$$240=280+b$$
$$b=-40$$
Thus $f(x)=35x-40$, which also gives $590$ when $x=18$. The answer is D.
